active_work.text: Mission-control metrics remain 25/68 verified, 1 active, 0 blocked, and 1 deferred. The native R/TMB Big 4 numerical-guard diagnostics are banked on main as diagnostic evidence only, including q8 endpoint-status hardening without q8 promotion. The next companion-package gate is direct DRM.jl evidence from a clean DRM.jl worktree, followed by separate Julia-via-R registry/parity evidence before any bridge row is promoted. Direct Julia, Julia-via-R, release, CRAN, recovery, coverage, power, and selectable engine_control claims remain separate gates.
